chunks.en: I usually take a bath at night.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい夜にお風呂に入ります。

chunks.en: I take a bath after a long day of work.
chunks.ja: 長い仕事の一日のあとにお風呂に入ります。

chunks.en: I use soap and shampoo in the bath.
chunks.ja: お風呂で石けんとシャンプーを使います。

chunks.en: I wash my hair and my body well.
chunks.ja: 髪と体をしっかり洗います。

chunks.en: The warm water makes me feel relaxed.
chunks.ja: 温かいお湯は私をリラックスさせてくれます。

chunks.en: The warm water helps me forget my stress.
chunks.ja: 温かいお湯はストレスを忘れる助けになります。

chunks.en: After my bath, I drink a glass of water.
chunks.ja: お風呂のあと、コップ一杯の水を飲みます。

chunks.en: After my bath, I sleep very well.
chunks.ja: お風呂のあと、私はとてもよく眠れます。

outline: Opening: when I take a bath
Point 1: what I use to wash
Point 2: how warm and relaxed I feel
Wrap-up: what I do after the bath

modelTalk.text: It's night now. I'm ready for my bath. I take it after dinner. Sometimes I take a shower in the morning too. I really like warm water. First, I wash my hair. I use shampoo for that. Then I wash my body with soap. It smells nice. The warm water feels so good. My body's warm now. I'm calm and relaxed. That's a nice feeling. I stay in for ten minutes. After my bath, I'm thirsty. So I drink some water. Then I put on clean clothes. I don't stay up late. I sleep well. It's my favorite time.

chunks.en: Today I want to talk about my bath time.
chunks.ja: 今日は私のお風呂の時間について話したいです。

chunks.en: I usually take a bath at night after work.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい仕事のあと夜にお風呂に入ります。

chunks.en: I use soap and shampoo to get clean.
chunks.ja: 私は体をきれいにするために石けんとシャンプーを使います。

chunks.en: The warm water helps me feel very relaxed.
chunks.ja: 温かいお湯は私をとてもリラックスさせてくれます。

chunks.en: I like to sit in the hot water quietly.
chunks.ja: 私は熱いお湯の中で静かに座るのが好きです。

chunks.en: After my bath I drink a glass of water.
chunks.ja: お風呂のあと、私はコップ一杯の水を飲みます。

chunks.en: So my bath time is the best part of my day.
chunks.ja: だからお風呂の時間は私の一日で一番いい時間です。

outline: Point 1: when I bathe and what I use
Point 2: how warm water relaxes me
Wrap-up: what I do after and why I love it

modelTalk.text: I love my bath time. I take a shower every night. I do this after dinner. First, I turn on the warm water. I use soap for my body. Then I wash my hair with shampoo. It smells nice and fresh. The warm water feels so good. I'm tired after a long day. But the bath helps me relax. My body gets warm and soft. I feel happy and calm. After my bath, I dry my hair. Then I drink a glass of water. I'm thirsty, so it's really nice. I put on my soft pajamas. Then I'm ready for bed. I sleep well after a bath.
